name: poly_bevel_Q2_nonadjacent_square
description: Polygon Bevel (mesh.bevel, edit-mode Polygons) SQUARE CORNER -- task 0458 Phase 3, finding Q2 (two NON-adjacent faces). Cube +Y (top) and -Y (bottom) faces -- they share no edge, so group=true has nothing to fuse -- inset=0.25, shift=0.15, square=true. Reference topology: 8v/6f -> 32v/22f: two INDEPENDENT Q1 patterns (group is inert for non-adjacent faces), and the 4 shared cube side faces absorb splits from BOTH squares, becoming OCTAGONS.
source: Frozen reference-editor capture via the private capture harness's polygon-bevel op (task 0458 Phase 0 dump-oracle poly_bevel_Q2_nonadjacent_square). Isolates Square-Corner's per-face behavior from any group-corner interaction.

provenance.harness: private capture harness (reference-editor polygon-bevel tool, headless scripted op-dump)
provenance.notes: Phase-0 dump-oracle for square=true + group=true on two non-adjacent faces. Kernel implemented task 0458 Phase 3 (bevelFacesByMask's square param, source/mesh.d).
